textByHash.47944c35dd48b48f783c4041ad8f277105f41ca5: Iban is our father, our guide. Soon he will rule all life.
textByHash.73041f72626680e7ad6308a2c56e2677f139890b: Hail the great one, my lord Iban. I die for you again and again.
textByHash.4b9c3147d16eeb8e0fa6bb4a88cca5fee691b00e: Under Iban anything is possible. Death is only the beginning.
textByHash.1924aca5ff24697fe8f31babda9c02669165bb82: Succumb to the might of Iban, the ruler of this world.
